[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100111 4
1 011111101 7
2 111111111 a
3 101001111 6
4 100111111 7
5 100111111 7
6 011111111 8
7 111111111 a

01 10 111111111 a match 2 7
12 21 101001111 6 match 3
23 32 100111111 7 match 4 5
34 43 100111111 7 match 4 5
45 54 011111111 8 match 6
56 65 111111111 a match 2 7
67 76 111101111 8
70 07 011111111 8 match 6

02 20 111111101 8
13 31 101111111 8
24 42 100101111 6
35 53 111111110 8
46 64 111101111 8
57 75 011110111 7
60 06 111111111 a match 2 7
71 17 101100111 6

03 30 111111111 a match 2 7
14 41 101101111 7
25 52 111011111 8
36 63 111111011 8
47 74 000101111 5
50 05 011111111 8 match 6
61 16 111101111 8
72 27 100101111 6

04 40 011111111 8 match 6
15 51 111010111 7
26 62 111101111 8
37 73 100111111 7 match 4 5
